+def main():

+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    ap.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)

+    ap.add_argument('--checkpoint', required=True)

+    ap.add_argument('--output', required=True)

+    args = ap.parse_args()

+

+    model = Model(NUM_CLASSES).to(DEVICE)

+    ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=DEVICE)

+    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model'])

+    model.eval()

+

+    img_size = ckpt.get('img_size', 252)

+    # Multi-scale TTA: train size + slightly larger

+    sizes = [img_size, int(img_size * 1.15)]

+    # Round to multiples of 14 for DINOv2 patch alignment

+    sizes = [int(round(s / 14)) * 14 for s in sizes]

+

+    probs_sum = None

+    for s in sizes:

+        p = predict_at(model, args.data_path, s)

+        probs_sum = p if probs_sum is None else probs_sum + p

+    probs = probs_sum / len(sizes)

     preds = probs.argmax(1).numpy().tolist()
